title: Dream — mom sets up a shooter drill, Yahir freezes
html:
Dream — mom sets up a shooter drill, Yahir freezes

Source: 2020-06-13 Apple Note. The matching bookend to the tribal fight dream from a month earlier — same setup of being singled out and tested under threat, but here the antagonist is family-orchestrated.

TL;DR

  • Dream where mom sets up an elaborate fake home-invasion drill at 4am to test Yahir; she pays "Chase WONNEl" to act as the intruder.
  • Yahir is handed a gun, freezes, fails to act when the moment comes — the intruder smiles at him through the garage window, he panics, runs inside.
  • Dad (drunk in the dream) and brother Yermers are hiding poorly. Dad tells Yahir afterward he could have ended it during the garage-door transition if he'd jumped the guy.
  • The reveal: the whole thing was a setup organized by mom to test his readiness. "I was a pussy, and because of it my family could have payed the price."
  • Companion to the tribal fight dream from May — same theme of being singled out and tested in front of people he loves.

Pattern observed

Two pandemic-era dream logs back-to-back center on the test of readiness when the moment comes. In both, Yahir is positioned as the underdog, watched by his crew/family, expected to act decisively, and either succeeds via creativity or freezes. This becomes a lifelong theme — see "max effort commit" manifesto four years later, or the "fall backwards into the void with a smile" post.

Open questions

  • "Chase WONNEl" — real person (misspelled)?
  • The dream's logic that mom orchestrated this test — what was Yahir's relationship with his mom in mid-2020?

Related

  • yahir family
  • emilio
  • 2020 05 07 dream tribal fight
  • fear of not doing
